data.title: Blackhawk Network and Mastercard launch specific prepaid rewards for fuel, EV charging, and groceries in new partnership.
data.description: Pleasanton, California - Blackhawk Network has announced an expansion of its partnership with Mastercard to introduce two additional prepaid card rewards products.
KAZAKHSTAN SAYS IT CONFIRMS THAT THERE WAS A TEMPORARY DECLINE IN OIL SHIPMENTS THROUGH THE MARINE TERMINAL IN DECEMBER VIA CPC DUE TO DRONE ATTACKS

data.title: SchoolWise Partners helps sell East Cobb Prep, an Atlanta Early Learning Center, to Cadence Education in 2026.
data.description: On January 13, 2026, in Miami, SchoolWise Partners revealed the completion of the sale of East Cobb Prep, a prominent early learning center in the greater area. SchoolWise is recognized as the primary sell-side advisor for owners of early childhood education businesses in the country. This transaction marks another success for SchoolWise in facilitating the sale of educational enterprises.

data.title: Capital Engine partners with Regiment Securities to enhance private markets infrastructure & expand co-syndication, targeting $65 trillion market.
data.description: A global FinTech and investment bank called Capital Engine® has partnered with Regiment Securities, LLC (Regiment), a FINRA-registered financial services firm, to enhance private market distribution, co-syndication capabilities, and marketplace connectivity. This alliance aims to facilitate the co-syndication of specific private investment opportunities in the industry. Capital Engine® focuses on building critical infrastructure for the private markets, estimated to be valued at around $65 trillion. The collaboration with Regiment is seen as a strategic move to bolster their presence and offerings within the private market sector.

data.title: LangChain's No-Code Agent Builder is now generally available as LangSmith Agent Builder transitions from beta to GA, enabling non-developers to craft AI agents for intricate workflows without coding. Learn more.
data.description: The LangSmith Agent Builder has transitioned from beta to General Availability, allowing individuals who are not proficient in coding to develop AI agents for intricate workflows. This tool enables users to create these agents without the need for programming.
BONDUELLE reports monthly share and voting rights tally. #stocks #investment #corporate
VINCI: Reporting transactions on shares from Jan 5th-9th, 2026; important figures disclosed.
Touax: Share capital, voting rights on Dec 31, 2025.

data.title: Study at Cincinnati Children's restores 'exhausted' blood stem cells for improved transplant outcomes. Cincinnati, Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: A recent breakthrough by researchers at Cincinnati Children's has paved the way for enhanced outcomes in stem cell transplants and potentially better aging. The study, conducted in January 2026, revealed promising results in restoring health. The findings have the potential to positively impact the efficacy of stem cell transplants, leading to improved recovery rates. This discovery is significant as it may also contribute to healthier aging processes in the future. Overall, this innovative research showcases new possibilities in the field of stem cell treatments and their role in promoting better health outcomes.

data.title: Rebel Bourbon revives Rebel Root Beer Whiskey due to popular demand. St. Louis, Jan. 13, 2026.
data.description: Rebel Bourbon is thrilled to reintroduce the beloved Rebel Root Beer Whiskey to its renowned Rebel Bourbon collection. The unique concoction, infused with natural flavors, has made a triumphant comeback in St. Louis on Jan. 13, 2026. This fan-favorite drink offers an unconventional twist on the classic Rebel Bourbon formula, captivating customers with its distinct taste. Fans can now enjoy the award-winning Rebel Root Beer Whiskey once again, experiencing the perfect blend of flavors in every sip.

data.title: J. Wade Kelson resigns from Giv Care Inc. after leading its growth for several years. Company continues strong growth.
data.description: Midway, Utah - On January 13, 2026, Giv Care Inc. disclosed that J. Wade Kelson, the Co-Founder and President, is resigning from his position after providing foundational leadership and aiding in the initial expansion of the company over the past few years. Kelson has played a crucial role in the development of Giv Care Inc. and will be stepping down from his position.

data.title: Winston Pierce Investment expands to Canada offering AI trading and crypto services, utilizing advanced AI tech.
data.description: In Montreal on January 13, 2026, Winston Pierce has excitingly revealed its debut in Canada, unveiling cutting-edge AI-based trading solutions tailored for the rapidly evolving worldwide markets. Winston Pierce merges robust artificial intelligence with established skills in trading, offering a revolutionary platform for traders to leverage.
SalMar completed acquisition of shares in Øylaks MTB AS and issued new shares.

data.title: Battelle awarded $25.35 billion contract under DMEA’s ATSP V for engineering solutions in electronics/software problems.
data.description: Battelle, based in Columbus, Ohio, has secured a spot as one of the 10 companies chosen for contracts under the Defense Microelectronics Activity’s Advanced Technology Support Program V (ATSP V). This 10-year, government-wide contract is an Indefinite Delivery/Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) agreement with a total value capped at $25.35 billion. The purpose of this program is to swiftly offer engineering solutions for challenges related to electronics and software. Battelle's role under this contract will involve providing engineering development capabilities.
Executives and related parties have made share transactions in Vestjysk Bank A/S, now AL Sydbank A/S.

data.title: Confianza completes Series Seed 2 funding to accelerate growth and expansion - key for future success.
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida, on January 13, 2026, Confianza, a leading data and predictive analytics firm, disclosed the completion of its Series Seed 2 funding round. This successful funding round will back Confianza's growth strategy moving forward.

data.title: R&B/pop artist Gabby Samone to release debut single "Complicated" on Jan 16, with national TV debut on The Kelly Clarkson Show on Jan 14.
data.description: A standout contestant from American Idol Season 23, Gabby Samone, is set to mark a significant milestone with her highly anticipated debut. The talented singer will be gracing national television screens with her first performance of "Complicated" on The Kelly Clarkson Show. The episode is scheduled to air on Wednesday, January 14. Fans can pre-save the song "Complicated" for download to enjoy the cover of her debut performance.
Aspo Plc buys back shares on January 13, 2026.

data.title: Baja California Sur raises Embrace It program fee to 488 pesos for international visitors as of Jan 1, 2026; funds for various projects. (Character count: 137)
data.description: Starting January 1, 2026, the Embrace It program in Baja California Sur has been increased from 470 to 488 pesos per individual. These funds will be specifically designated for initiatives related to environmental preservation, enhancing tourism infrastructure, and supporting social and cultural programs. data.title: Inventor from Lincoln, Calif. creates ROCK LOCK - adjustable radius arm for trucks. Enhances suspension systems.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 13, 2026, an inventor from Lincoln, California shared the creation of the ROCK LOCK, a modified radius arm tailored for enhancing the suspension system in modern super duty trucks. This innovative product offers adjustability to provide either increased flexibility or stability for the trucks. The invention is set to revolutionize the suspension setup of super duty trucks, promising improved performance and driving experience.
